A New Publishing House  ·  A New Genre

Where Story
Meets the Infinite

Fiction and memoir born from the deepest places in the human experience — held with empathy, released toward the stars.

Discover the Books What is Empathic Origin Fiction?
The Genre  ·  The House

Empathic Origin Fiction

A genre unlike any other — born here, belonging here. Empathic Origin Fiction is the literature of the wound that becomes a doorway. Stories where the most vulnerable place in a character is also the place where their greatest power originates.

Galactic in scope. Intimate in truth. Fiction and memoir that insist you are both small and sacred — and that the storm you have been surviving was always preparing you for something larger.

Stories rooted in emotional intelligence and the full range of human experience

Heroes whose origin is relational — not exceptional by accident

Worlds vast enough to hold real grief, real wonder, and real survival

The stars did not call her because she was unbroken. They called her because she had learned to carry the fracture gently.
— Empathic Origin Fiction
Our Books

Stories That Hold You

Two authors. Two entirely different worlds. One publishing house built on the belief that empathy is where every great story begins.

The Seventh Layer

Solara goes deeper — into realms constructed from memory, longing, and a love that predates time.

The Constellation

The Constellation

The trilogy closes. Solara discovers the full magnitude of what she carries.

Gemma the Cat · A Growing Collection
Gemma the Cat
Tales from the Space Between Spaces
Story · Bedtime Edition · Tarot · Origins

Visit Gemma's World →
A New World · By Empathic Origin Fiction

Gemma the Cat

Tales from the Space Between Spaces

A small, glowing cat who slips quietly between worlds — leaving a trail of starlight and falling petals wherever she goes. Gemma's stories are gentle, luminous, and made for the in-between moments: bedtime, daydreams, and the soft space where wonder still lives.

Who is Gemma?

Gemma exists in the quiet seam between one place and another — between waking and sleeping, between this world and the next, between who you were and who you're becoming. She doesn't explain the magic she carries. She simply arrives, sits with you for a while, and leaves a little light behind.

This corner of Empathic Origin Fiction is for the youngest readers — and for the part of every reader, at any age, that still believes a cat might be more than she appears.

A Memoir That Will Stay With You

From Safe Haven — published under Empathic Origin Fiction

01
Memoir · Literary Fiction
∞
Letters Written
02
Still Standing
"In the eye of chaos,
truth whispers."
Order Paperback
Safe Haven
Letters from the Eye of the Storm
She Is Still In There

A mother. A daughter. A diagnosis that should never have happened.

Letters from the Eye of the Storm is the unfiltered account of a woman navigating the wreckage of a broken medical system, an abusive relationship that stole her daughter's mind, and the daily reality of loving someone who has become a stranger inside a familiar face.

Written in real time. Held together by letters, notes, and the specific courage of someone who refused to disappear.

She is still in there. And so is her mother. Still standing. Still writing. Still waiting for the storm to pass.
Memoir / Literary Fiction  ·  Empathic Origin Fiction

Handbound Keepsake Edition · Yousra Z

Pearl's Journey

A Story of Love, Loss, and Forever

Pearl was a silver cat with golden eyes and a heart so full of love it could barely fit inside her small, shimmering body. She found her family — and for a while, everything was warm and whole and exactly as it should be. But some hellos are also, quietly, the beginning of a goodbye.

Those we love do not leave us. They change shape. They find new ways to reach us. They stay.

Inside the Book · Illustrations
The Keepsake Edition

Each Pearl's Journey keepsake is handbound — a premium hardcover notebook with full-color glued celestial illustrations, gold-embossed details, and a satin ribbon bookmark. Made slowly. Made with intention. No two are exactly alike.

Pairs beautifully with our hand-poured resin bookmark collection →

A Note on Handmade Time

"Each keepsake is made by one pair of hands — mine."

Because of this, every order carries a 45-day fulfillment window. If yours is ready sooner, it ships sooner — but please allow the full 45 days so the care that goes into each one isn't rushed. Handmade things take the time they take. That's part of what makes them yours.

Handbound Keepsake Edition · Yousra Z

Aqua

A Story of Big Love in a Small Space

Some dogs love with their whole body — tail wagging, paws skidding, heart wide open. Aqua was one of those dogs. Snow-white and sky-blue-eyed, he was a gentle giant who didn't know his own size — only how to love, loudly and completely, everyone who came near him.

And about the truth that love, once given, never really leaves.

About This Book

This is a story about a dog who was never abandoned — only given the chance to live fully. A story about grief and gratitude, about missing someone and being glad they were loved. About the choices we make when we love something more than we love our own comfort.

For every child — and every adult — who has ever had to say goodbye to someone they weren't ready to lose.

Pairs with our hand-poured resin bookmark collection →

A Note on Handmade Time

"Each keepsake is made by one pair of hands — mine."

Every order carries a 45-day fulfillment window. If yours is ready sooner, it ships sooner — but please allow the full 45 days so the care that goes into each one isn't rushed. Handmade things take the time they take. That's part of what makes them yours.

More of Aqua's story arriving soon — interior illustrations, keepsake details & more. ✨

Little Empaths Library · Yousra Z

Little Empaths Library

The Sweet Dreams Cloud

A growing collection of children's books — bedtime stories, gentle adventures, and tales full of heart. Each one written with love, illustrated with magic, and made for the in-between moments when the world gets quiet and a good story is all you need.

More titles arriving — emotions, manners, languages, numbers, and whatever else sparks joy. This nook is always growing. ✨

Tales from the Space Between Spaces
Handmade Keepsake · Limited

Hand-Poured Resin Bookmark

Each book in the Sweet Dreams Nook pairs with a hand-poured resin bookmark — made individually, no two exactly alike. A little piece of magic to hold your place in the story.

Choose your character — Pearl, Aqua, Nibbles, Vulcan, or Gemma — and receive a one-of-a-kind keepsake poured with care and intention, just for your little reader.

A Note on Handmade Time

"Each resin bookmark is poured by one pair of hands — mine. Every one is a little different. That is the point."

Every order carries a 45-day fulfillment window. If yours is ready sooner, it ships sooner. Handmade things take the time they take — and that is part of what makes them yours.

Resin bookmarks available to order when books are live. Coming soon. ✨

More stories arriving in the Little Empaths Library — emotions, manners, languages, numbers, potty training for pets, and everything else that makes little ones laugh, learn and drift off happy. 🌙
